backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management and booking submission logic, with role-based access control (admin/user) and stable storage for submissions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state (flat submission records with `nextSubmissionId`) into the new nested `BookingForm`/`BookingSubmission` structure with `lastSubmissionId`.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (useGetAllSubmissions hook fix, AdminPage rendering, BookingForm mutation) to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the DJ Fizz React SPA, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading `main.tsx` as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app using TanStack Router with a shared Header/Footer layout and two routes: HomePage (`/`) and AdminPage (`/admin`).
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section displaying DJ Fizz's portrait photo with a neon green glow frame alongside bio copy, styled with radial gradient accents on a dark background.
frontend/src/components/AddOns.tsx: Renders a 'Premium Add-Ons' section displaying five DJ service upgrades (lighting, audio, projection) as icon cards in a responsive grid with neon-green styling.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Booking inquiry form with fields for event details that submits via a React Query mutation, showing loading, success, and error states.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with DJ Fizz branding, quick navigation links, contact info, social icons, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Placeholder gallery section that renders an empty section element with the id 'gallery'.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with smooth-scroll nav links, a logo, mobile hamburger menu, and an admin route button; background changes on scroll.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section featuring a banner image, animated neon-green light beam overlays, a headline, and CTA buttons that scroll to page sections.
frontend/src/components/MoreThanMusic.ts: Two-column section highlighting DJ Fizz's event-professional qualities (timeline management, crowd reading, coordination, transitions) via descriptive text and icon cards.
frontend/src/components/SEOSection.tsx: A React section component that displays SEO-optimized content for DJ Fizz's services in Raleigh, NC, including location, event types, and a scroll-to-booking CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a grid of four DJ service cards (Weddings, Corporate, School Dances, Private Parties) with icons, descriptions, and a scroll-to-booking link.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Displays a grid of five client testimonials with star ratings, quotes, and event details for DJ Fizz's past events.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity or anonymously, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and helper functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all booking submissions and submitting a new booking form via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for a dark neon-green theme, and adds utility classes for glow effects, glass cards, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin page component that fetches and displays all booking form submissions as styled cards, with Internet Identity login/logout support and a refresh button. Each card shows booking details like name, email, phone, event type, date, venue, guest count, and timestamps.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page that composes all site sections (Hero, About, Services, AddOns, MoreThanMusic, Gallery, Testimonials, SEOSection, BookingForm) into a single scrollable page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the DJ Fizz site's design tokens including neon green accent colors, deep black palette, Bebas Neue/Inter fonts, neon glow box-shadows, and custom keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing the DJ Fizz website's current build status, architectural decisions (black/neon-green palette, ICP backend for bookings, no flat pricing), existing features, and known issues with the gallery, admin page authentication, and booking form submissions.
